fields.title: Enabled
fields.help: Start Image-Orb when Ponderer boots.

fields.title: Model Family
fields.help: Select the pipeline family. Prompt handling differs by family.

fields.title: Model Reference
fields.help: Hugging Face repo id or local model path. Relative paths are checked from the Ponderer runtime folder first, then this plugin folder. For FLUX GGUF, set this to a .gguf file path.

fields.title: FLUX Base Model
fields.help: Used only when model_family=flux and model_ref points to a .gguf transformer file.

fields.title: FLUX GGUF Compute Dtype
fields.help: Compute dtype used for GGUF transformer quantization execution.

fields.title: Model Cache
fields.help: Portable local cache for downloaded model weights.

fields.title: Output Folder
fields.help: Where generated image files are written.

fields.title: Device
fields.help: Inference target device. Choose CUDA to use the CUDA Device Index below.

fields.title: CUDA Device Index
fields.help: Used only when Device is CUDA. Set 0 for your primary GPU, 1 for a secondary GPU, etc.

fields.title: Precision
fields.help: Torch dtype used when loading the pipeline.

fields.title: Attention
fields.help: Attention optimization mode. xformers requires xformers installed.

fields.title: CPU Offload
fields.help: Enable model CPU offload when supported by the loaded pipeline.

fields.title: Memory Safe Mode
fields.help: Automatically cap resolution/steps by model family and device to reduce out-of-memory crashes.

fields.title: Allow CPU Fallback
fields.help: If enabled, meta-tensor failures may retry on CPU (can dramatically increase RAM use).

fields.title: Unload After Generation
fields.help: Unload the pipeline after each image (lower idle RAM, but may increase latency).

fields.title: Max Prompt Characters
fields.help: Clamp very long prompts before generation to keep allocations bounded.

fields.title: Max RSS (MB)
fields.help: Soft process memory budget. Image-Orb refuses generation above this and unloads when exceeded.

fields.title: Local Files Only
fields.help: Refuse network downloads and load only from local cache/path.

fields.title: Single-File Config Cache
fields.help: Diffusers config folder used for local .safetensors/.ckpt pipelines. If missing, Image-Orb can bootstrap it when Local Files Only is disabled.

fields.title: Single-File Config Repo
fields.help: Optional Hugging Face repo id used to bootstrap single-file config cache (leave blank for family defaults).

fields.title: Default Negative Prompt
fields.help: Used by SDXL/SD1.5 when no per-call negative prompt is provided.

fields.title: Default Seed
fields.help: Use -1 for random seed every call.

fields.title: LoRA Stack (JSON)
fields.help: JSON array of adapters. Example: [{"source":"my/lora","weight_name":"lora.safetensors","adapter_name":"style","scale":0.8,"enabled":true}]

fields.title: Prompt Hint
fields.help: Optional guidance injected into prompt contributions for this image family.
fields.default_value: FLUX prefers natural language scene descriptions. SDXL/SD1.5 often benefit from explicit negative prompts.
